findings.description: No E2E tests for L-P3-001 Resource Gauges (per-cluster breakdown). New UI feature requires at least a smoke E2E.
No E2E tests for L-P3-002 Anomaly Timeline enhancements (distribution bar, severity summary). New UI components require E2E coverage.
No E2E tests for L-P3-003 Feature Flags collapsible activity log. Interactive expand/collapse needs E2E verification.
No E2E tests for L-P3-004 Log Viewer advanced features (regex search, timestamp formatting, highlighting). These are interactive features requiring E2E.
All mock anomalies now have status:'open' — lost 'acknowledged' and 'resolved' status variety from old mocks. filterOpenAnomalies path for non-open statuses is no longer exercised by mocks.
BOARD.md marks items with date '2025-07-22' but current date is 2026-03-05.
